resource_notes.change: Only hidden=7168 dispatches to a new three-launch all64 path. Gate/up remains M64, 512 threads, pack2. Full down remains M64, 512 threads, N128, pack2 and runs only for actual_rows==64. A third tail down kernel uses M32, 256 threads, N128, pack2 for the upper/lower 32-row halves of original partial M64 tiles. hidden=2048 retains the original path.
directed_correctness: hidden=7168, intermediate=256, experts=4, valid=300: per-expert 64+11 rows, allclose=true, max_abs_error=0.000244140625.
hidden=7168, intermediate=256, experts=4, valid=180: per-expert 32+13 rows, allclose=true, max_abs_error=0.000244140625.
resource_notes.formal_protocol: p2/p3 used seed=81394, warmup=10, iters=100, --check; both passed allclose.
resource_notes.shared_memory: Each full/tail down CTA statically allocates two 128x128 float16 down-weight shared buffers, 65536 bytes total. The extra tail launch does not coexist in the same CTA. Gate/up shared allocation is unchanged.
resource_notes.register_spill: The default TileLang/MACA compile log emitted no register-count or spill diagnostics. Tail uses two 32x128 FP32 accumulator fragments and one 32x128 float16 activation fragment with 256 threads.
resource_notes.stopped_early: The required p2+p3 combined gain was below 3%, so p1 and random-groups seed 1/20260713 were not run, per the hard rejection threshold and principal-agent instruction.
